articles.title: MagSafe battery banks: Best picks for your iPhone 17, iPhone Air, and more
articles.summary: With iPhone Air, Apple reintroduced the MagSafe battery pack. It’s $99, and optimized specifically for iPhone Air. It’s rather slim, though it’s rather weak in capacity – making Qi2 alternatives all the more interesting. We’ll be delving into the top options on the market, just in case you want a higher capacity MagSafe battery for your iPhone, or aren’t buying the iPhone Air.
articles.title_zh: MagSafe 行動電源：iPhone 17、iPhone Air 等最佳選擇
articles.summary_zh: Apple 重新推出 MagSafe 電池組，售價 $99，專為 iPhone Air 優化。雖然容量較小，但 Qi2 替代方案同樣值得關注。

articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: ‘Mirage’ brings your Mac display to iPad and more with retina quality
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . Mirage is a brand new app that brings best-in-class desktop wireless screen sharing to your entire Apple ecosystem. You can stream from your Mac to your iPhone, iPad, Vision Pro, or even another Mac. It’s very low latency and has a plethora of great features that make it the one stop shop for remotely using your Mac.
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用焦點：Mirage 以視網膜品質將 Mac 顯示器投射到 iPad 等裝置
articles.summary_zh: Mirage 是一款全新應用，提供同級最佳的桌面無線螢幕分享功能，可連接整個 Apple 設備生態。

articles.title: iPadOS 27: Apple is leaving these five iPad models behind, but owners deserve better
articles.summary: We’re about 3 weeks out from when Apple unveiled iOS 27 to the world at WWDC26, and it’s still safe to say: this is an incredible update. It’s incredibly performant , and besides some small quirks and a little battery drain, it feels much more usable than iOS 26.5. While iOS 27 does support every device that ran iOS 26, the same isn’t true for iPadOS. A number of older iPadOS 26 devices will not be receiving the iPadOS 27 update, which I think is quite a shame – and Apple should mitigate this one way or another.
articles.title_zh: iPadOS 27：Apple 拋棄五款 iPad 機型，但用戶應該得到更好的對待
articles.summary_zh: 距離 Apple 在 WWDC26 發表 iOS 27 約三週，這是一次令人驚艷的更新，效能出眾，儘管有些小問題和電池耗電，但比 iOS 26.5 更易用。

articles.title: What new Google Messages features are rolling out [June 2026]
articles.summary: Like other Google apps, Messages for Android A/B tests many features. It can take the RCS/SMS client a rather long time to actually launch new functionality in stable. From various reports, Google announcements , and devices we’ve checked, this is the current state of Messages.
articles.title_zh: Google Messages 推出哪些新功能 [2026 年 6 月]
articles.summary_zh: Google Messages 進行多項 A/B 測試，RCS/SMS 用戶端需要相當長的時間才能推出穩定版新功能。

articles.title: Upgrade your social media with Vmake’s all-in-one studio – here’s what it can do
articles.summary: The social media age begs businesses and everyone else to bridge the gap between quality and quantity and, with Vmake’s AI studio of tools, you get an all-in-one, one-stop shop for everything you need to more easily create content.
articles.title_zh: 使用 Vmake 的一站式工作室升級您的社群媒體—以下是它能做的事
articles.summary_zh: Vmake AI 工具工作室提供一站式服務，幫助企業和個人輕鬆平衡品質與數量，創作更多內容。

articles.title: Galaxy M47 key specs, Tecno Camon Slim official, Week 26 in review
articles.summary: Samsung has confirmed the Galaxy M47 5G will launch in India on June 29. The phone packs a 6.7-inch 120Hz AMOLED display, a Snapdragon chipset, a 6,000mAh battery with 45W charging, and a 50MP main camera with OIS. Samsung is promising six Android updates and six years of security patches, making software support one of its biggest highlights. Tecno unveiled the Camon Slim to join the Spark and Pova Slim phones. This one is a tad thicker at 6.39mm, but it packs a large 6,000mAh battery, and is IP69/IP68 water-tight. The Nothing Phone (4b) is coming on July 7. This week, it showed off...
articles.title_zh: Galaxy M47 關鍵規格、Tecno Camon Slim 正式公布，第 26 週回顧
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 確認 Galaxy M47 5G 將於 6 月 29 日在印度推出，配備 6.7 吋 120Hz AMOLED 顯示屏、Snapdragon 晶片、6000mAh 電池與 45W 充電、50MP 主鏡頭，提供六年 Android 更新和安全補丁支持。

articles.title: Samsung starts working on One UI 9 for the Galaxy A24 4G after releasing stable One UI 8.5 update
articles.summary: Samsung released the Android 16-based One UI 8.5 stable update for the Galaxy A24 4G a few days ago, and now we learn it has started testing the Android 17-based One UI 9 for this smartphone. The One UI 9 build for the Galaxy A24 4G spotted on Samsung's server has firmware version A245FXXUCGZF4, but we don't know when Samsung will release the One UI 9 beta or stable update for the smartphone. In fact, the only smartphones that have received the One UI 9 beta so far are the Galaxy S26 series smartphones, even though Samsung is working on One UI 9 for multiple Galaxy devices. While...
articles.title_zh: Samsung 在發布穩定版 One UI 8.5 後開始開發 Galaxy A24 4G 的 One UI 9
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 已為 Galaxy A24 4G 發布 Android 16 版本的 One UI 8.5 穩定更新，現已開始測試 Android 17 版本的 One UI 9。

articles.title: Google Wallet can now track your packages
articles.summary: While probably not the most obvious or sensible integration out there, it does sound like a pretty nifty one. Also, we are pretty certain that this is not the first time Google has experimented with package tracking. If memory serves right, the now-retired Google Now (or rather transformed into Google Discover feed) used to offer the very same thing. Anyway, the idea is simple – Google scans your Gmail inbox and automatically recognizes digital receipts and tracking numbers, then simply uses those to provide parcel tracking info as part of the Google Wallet interface. The UI places...
articles.title_zh: Google Wallet 現可追蹤您的包裹
articles.summary_zh: Google Wallet 現已新增包裹追蹤功能，這項整合雖然不是最直觀的，但確實很實用。

articles.title: Foldable gaming mode is coming with Android 17
articles.summary: Frankly, we don’t see gaming-specific features come to the Android core all too often. Recently, ex-journalist and now Google employee Mishaal Rahman offered up a surprisingly detailed preview of a great new feature coming to Android 17. It is called Foldable gaming mode, and what it does is basically spawn a highly customizable virtual controller on the bottom half of your unfolded foldable device, with the actual game playing on the top half. For now, it’s just a 50/50 split, which you can’t adjust, but that could come in the future. The virtual joystick emulates controller...
articles.title_zh: Android 17 即將推出折疊手機遊戲模式
articles.summary_zh: Android 17 將新增折疊手機遊戲模式功能，這是 Android 核心少見的遊戲特定功能。

articles.title: Deals: Prime Day shopping is over, here are the best Galaxy S26 and Pixel 10 series deals
articles.summary: The four days of Amazon Prime Day shopping ended this Friday – so, let’s look at what the prices are like now. We’ve picked out the Samsung Galaxy S26 flagships plus a couple of Galaxy mid-rangers as well as the non-folding phones of the Google Pixel 10 lineup. The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra still starts at under $1,000. However, that buys you 256GB of storage. You can upgrade to 512GB, but this year this is a $200 upgrade. As usual, we’ll point you to our comparison articles against the Galaxy S25 Ultra and iPhone 17 Pro Max. ...
articles.title_zh: 優惠：Prime Day 購物結束，Galaxy S26 和 Pixel 10 系列最佳優惠
articles.summary_zh: Amazon Prime Day 四天購物活動已結束，Galaxy S26 旗艦機和 Pixel 10 非折疊系列目前仍有優惠價格。

articles.title: ★ Bernie Sanders: Ideologue and Economic Ignoramus
articles.summary: Sanders’s tweet is better punctuated and capitalized, but it’s the same argument as Trump’s. Zero economic sense, 100 percent ideological wishful thinking.
articles.title_zh: ★ 伯尼·桑德斯：思想家與經濟學白癡
articles.summary_zh: 桑德斯的推文標點和大小寫更規範，但論點與特朗普相同，毫無經濟意義，100% 意識型態的空想。
